## 🔒 Security Checklist

**Required for all PRs**

- [ ] No use of `eval`, `Function`, or similar  
- [ ] All inputs are validated and sanitized  
- [ ] No command injection risk  
- [ ] No sensitive data exposure  
- [ ] Safe error handling implemented  
- [ ] No unnecessary dependencies added  

---

## ⚙️ Command System Impact

If this PR affects the command system:

- [ ] Single-command execution verified  
- [ ] Multi-command execution verified  
- [ ] Parser behavior tested  
- [ ] Invalid input handling tested  

---
